literal_meaning: with the quenching of this, this is quenched
preferred_translation: with the quenching of this, this ceases
definition: Core quenching formula for the cessation side of dependent arising.
notes: Use this record for the whole formula line rather than substituting ungoverned causal paraphrases. It governs the repository's default voice for the quenching side of conditionality and should stay coordinated with the nirodha headword. The Buddhadasa usage profile supports keeping the quenching side of the formula vivid and practical.

context_rules.context: In standard conditionality and dependent-arising translation
context_rules.rendering: with the quenching of this, this ceases

context_rules.context: In doctrinal prose that is already using cessation as the controlled alternate for nirodha
context_rules.rendering: with the cessation of this, this ceases
context_rules.notes: Use only when the surrounding frame is already governed by that alternate.

example_phrases.translation: with the quenching of this, this ceases

authority_basis.scope: Supports keeping the quenching side of the formula vivid and practical.

translation_policy.default_scope: Use as the standard quenching line in dependent-arising translation.
translation_policy.when_not_to_apply: Do not switch between quenching and cessation inside the same formula family without an explicit doctrinal reason.
translation_policy.drift_risk: Prevents instability between quenching and cessation language in the core negative formula.
